docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BENFORD,RAY
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-21-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-16-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAHO BUILDERS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENFORD,RAY $140.00 PRINCIPAL, $49.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $189.00, JUDGMENT REPRESENTS ACTUAL WORK PERFORMED BY WAHO & VALUE REC'D BY DEFT. NO FIND OF A CONTRACT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $916.39 FILED BY WAHO BUILDERS AS TO DEFENDANT BENFORD,RAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-15-1994, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO JUL-21-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
FOR BENDER AGAINST WAHO $138.BENDER SHALL PAY WAHO DIFFRENCE BET AMT HE OWES TO WAHO & WHAT WAHO OWES BENDER. AMT REPRESENTS REASONABLE TRAVEL COST
